generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData StyrofoamBoxTemperatureDataTransmission
]
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData StyrofoamBoxTemperatureDataTransmission
]
instance StyrofoamBoxTemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2
]
instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ",
    DTDFVocab:fromData StyrofoamBoxTemperatureDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4EmbeddedController, RabbitMQCommunicationServer, ScipyOptimizationPackage
]
instance RaspberryPi4EmbeddedController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used as embedded controller for hardware interfacing with sensors and actuators",
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService, MonitoringService
]
instance RabbitMQCommunicationServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for real-time message-oriented communication between components",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]
instance ScipyOptimizationPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization algorithms in digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]
instance StyrofoamBoxThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model represented by differential equations calibrated using real-time temperature data from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationPackage
]
instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for heating the styrofoam box interior with hardware-implemented safety constraints to prevent overheating"
]
instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation with hardware-implemented safety constraints to prevent overheating"
]
instance StyrofoamBoxEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box environment containing thermal control components",
    base:contains DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring service to assess safety and operational optimality of the styrofoam box system",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]
instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation service to replicate physical twin behavior under current conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Algorithm-based fault detection service for identifying system anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]
instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service to infer system state from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimateInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for dynamic parameter adjustment based on predictive analytics",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedControlAction
]
instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control service to adjust physical components based on system state",
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating potential safety violations in the styrofoam box environment"
]
instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight assessing operational optimality of the styrofoam box system"
]
instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from predictive simulation of physical twin behavior"
]
instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying detected faults in system components"
]
instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the styrofoam box system based on sensor data"
]
instance OptimizedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action to adjust system parameters based on optimization algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Supervisory control action to adjust physical components based on system state",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller listens to RabbitMQ for commands to control the fan and heatbed operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update the models of the cyber-physical system and environment with the best parameter estimates from sensor data; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria, detecting violations that trigger corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server deployed for synchronization and communication between Physical and Digital Twins using AMQP protocol over TCP/IP, with message acknowledgments and persistent queues ensuring reliable data delivery."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Edge deployment on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware with RabbitMQ server running locally, providing on-premise computational resources for real-time data processing and storage."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs monitoring systems to evaluate the Physical Twin's operational safety and optimality. Upon detecting safety violations, corrective actions are executed by human operators or automated algorithms to adjust the Physical Twin's state."
]
